PTNT_DSCHRG_STUS_CD 

LABEL: Patient Discharge Status Code 

DESCRIPTION: The code used to identify the status of the patient as of the CLM_THRU_DT. 

SHORT NAME: 

LONG NAME: 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs)

VALUES: This code set is an external code set maintained by the National Uniform Billing Committee
